description: Style NoteSpring's print trend sees a comeback in this tonga dress, referencing your wild spirit within. The dress is balanced with Victorian themed lace details - a perfect fusion of vintage and contemporary.Product DetailsBlack and cream sleeveless printed dress with shawl neckline, lace at the back chest, elastication at the midriff and a flaring skirtMaterial and Care100% rayonHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
